source_credit: Reddit feature request comment ord69ib and similar request by u/jgreene030609
title: Article links missing from news data-point hover
problem: The all-record event_sample export had titles but no article URL column so the opening news dots could not link to source articles; tooltips also had no open-article affordance
resolution: Merged canonical source URLs from the event registry into event_sample.csv and added tooltip/open-article behavior for linked canvas and SVG data points
verification: Verified event_sample.csv has 21615 rows 21615 valid article URLs and story.js passes node --check
